name: Wand of Wonder
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to expend 1 charge while choosing a point within 120 feet of yourself. That location becomes the point of origin of a spell or other magical effect determined by rolling on the Wand of Wonder Effects table. Spells cast from the wand have a save DC of 15.
